title: taraxacum cinericolor
intro: Taraxacum cinericolor, also known as the Yellow Dandelion, is a species of flowering plant in the dandelion genus. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties due to the presence of sesquiterpene lactones and flavonoids. The health benefits of Taraxacum cinericolor include its potential to treat digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate skin conditions such as eczema and acne. Herbal preparations of Taraxacum cinericolor can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are often used to support liver health and boost the immune system.
